checks.describe: Ollama is running — the deep-dive page seeds nothing persistent and relies on the host model server (state-tolerant re-check)
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version | jq -r 'if .version then "ollama-up" else "ollama-down" end'

checks.describe: a long answer reports a positive, finite TPOT — the KV cache keeps decode at a steady rhythm (section 1). Asserts the shape 'a real per-token time', never a run-specific value
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 90 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"List, one short line each, ten things a readiness probe checks. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false}' | jq -r 'if (.eval_count > 20 and .eval_duration > 0) then "decode-steady" else "decode-odd" end'

checks.describe: two greedy (temperature 0, fixed seed) requests on this one engine return byte-identical text — greedy is deterministic within one engine/build (section 2). Self-contained; compares two live responses, asserts they matched
checks.run: R1=$(curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"Name one benefit of a rolling update. One short sentence. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false,"options":{"temperature":0,"seed":42}}' | jq -r '.response'); R2=$(curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"Name one benefit of a rolling update. One short sentence. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false,"options":{"temperature":0,"seed":42}}' | jq -r '.response'); if [ "$R1" = "$R2" ]; then echo greedy-deterministic; else echo greedy-diverged; fi

checks.describe: the course model's chat template exposes the Qwen im_start/im_end role markers — the hidden contract every message is wrapped in (section 3)
checks.run: ollama show --template qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'im_start' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo template-has-markers; else echo template-no-markers; fi'

checks.describe: with think:true the response carries a non-empty thinking field while the visible answer stays short — thinking is extra decode tokens toggled by the template (section 4). Asserts presence, not a specific length
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 90 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"Is 17 a prime number? Answer yes or no.","stream":false,"think":true}' | jq -r 'if ((.thinking | length) > 0 and .eval_count > 20) then "thinking-present" else "thinking-absent" end'
